channel.title: Pages on Pedro Gomes
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Pedro Gomes

item.title: About Me
item.author: pedro.gomes.prog@gmail.com (pedromgomes.github.io)
item.description: Hi, I’m Pedro Gomes, a 27 year old Software Engineer with a Master’s degree (in Software Engineering) who enjoys programming and technology. I’ve completed my studies at ISEP (Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto) in Porto - Portugal, where I currently live. During my college education I worked professionally for approximately two years using mainly .NET Core, SQL Server, Azure DevOps, Angular & Ionic. Computer Graphics is a field of great interest to me.
